message:
🐛 fix: deduplicate browser notifications with 5-minute cooldown (#2934)

Browser notifications for cluster unreachable/certificate errors were
firing every 30 seconds (evaluation cycle) because the dedup key was
deleted on resolve, then re-added when the cluster flapped back to
unreachable. This caused dozens of duplicate macOS notifications.

Fix: Replace Set<string> with Map<string, timestamp> and enforce a
5-minute cooldown (NOTIFICATION_COOLDOWN_MS) between repeat
notifications for the same alert. Keys are no longer deleted on
resolve — they expire naturally via the cooldown check.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
